title: Login fails when token expires
body: Users are logged out after refresh token expiry. The auth session module raises TokenRefreshError.

title: Document refresh token lifecycle
body: The docs should explain access token and refresh token expiration behavior.

title: Support question: user must sign in again
body: A user asks why they must sign in again after a long idle session.

title: Add session revocation endpoint
body: Feature request to revoke all descendants in a token family from an admin endpoint.

title: Refresh route returns 500 on malformed token
body: Malformed refresh token payload causes a server error instead of a support-safe auth error.
